SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation

Interface AIiDocumentationReference

All Superinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationElement, AIiDocumentationInlineElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
AIcDocumentationReference
public interface AIiDocumentationReference extends AIiDocumentationInlineElement
Represents a semantic inline reference to another documented object.

A reference is different from a plain link. It keeps a structured AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget, so renderers can resolve the final output link, report unresolved references, or render the reference as plain text when the target is unavailable.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getLabel()
    Returns the human-readable reference label.
    AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
    getReferenceTarget()
    Returns the structured reference target.
    String
    getTitle()
    Returns a human-readable reference title.

    Methods inherited from interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationElement

    getElementId, getMetadata, getMetadataValue, putMetadataValue, removeMetadataValue

  • Method Details

    • getLabel

      String getLabel()
      Returns the human-readable reference label.

      An empty string means that a renderer may derive the visible label from the reference target display name, qualified name, or target identifier.

      Returns:
      reference label, or an empty string if it should be derived

    • getReferenceTarget

      AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget getReferenceTarget()
      Returns the structured reference target.
      Returns:
      reference target

    • getTitle

      String getTitle()
      Returns a human-readable reference title.

      An empty string means that no title is available.

      Returns:
      reference title, or an empty string if no title is available
